backstory.original: Cazrin is the ray of sunshine in the party, the eternal optimist, the friendly ear or the shoulder to cry on. She is passionate about magic, knowledge, and learning, always experimenting or testing new theories. Growing up, Cazrin's family feared and forbade the study of magic because of an ancestress who misused her power, so Cazrin was forced to teach herself and eventually leave her family behind to pursue her dreams. Intelligent but inexperienced, she has embraced a life of adventuring to gather the thrills and experiences that as a child she could only read about in books.
backstory.display: 卡兹琳是探险队里的一缕阳光，她永远都那么乐观，既会耐心地听你倾诉，也能让你依靠在她的肩膀上哭泣。她十分热衷于魔法、知识和学习，总是在做实验或者验证新的理论。在卡兹琳成长的过程中，她的家人畏惧魔法并禁止她研习，这是因为她的一位女性先祖曾利用魔法来作恶，因此卡兹琳不得不自学，并最终离家去追寻自己的梦想。聪慧但缺乏经验的她选择投身冒险来体验那些她儿时只能在书本中读到的惊险和奇遇。

description.original: Cazrin fires 2 magic missiles at random enemies, preferring different targets if possible
description.display: 卡兹琳向随机敌人发射 2 枚魔法飞弹，若可能则优先选择不同目标

description.original: Cazrin attacks all enemies with a fireball.
description.display: 卡兹琳用火球攻击所有敌人。

longDescription.original: Cazrin attacks all enemies with her version of a fireball.
longDescription.display: 卡兹琳用她自创版本的火球攻击所有敌人。

description.desc: Uggie joins the party, starting next to Cazrin unless she's already in the formation next to another Fallbacks Champion. Uggie increases the damage of all non-adjacent Champions by $amount%.
乌吉加入探险队，并将默认与卡兹琳相邻，除非她已在阵型中并与另一位“后备队”勇士相邻。乌吉会使所有非相邻的勇士伤害提高 $amount%。

Whenever a boss is defeated for the first time in an adventure, it drops a Book that Cazrin collects. Subsequent kills of the same boss have a $chance% chance of dropping an additional Book. The maximum number of Books that can be collected during a single adventure is the highest area reached divided by $max_book_divisor, rounded down. Cazrin keeps track of both the number of Books she has collected in the current adventure, as well as the size of her Library, which is the number of Books she has collected across all adventures. Cazrin's damage is increased by $(amount___2)% for each book in her Library, stacking additively. Each time her Library reaches a new order of magnitude, the base buff is multiplicatively increased by $(amount___5)%.

每当在冒险中首次击败某个首领时，都会掉落一本由卡兹琳收集的书籍。此后再次击败同一首领时，有 $chance% 的几率额外掉落一本书。在单次冒险中可收集的书籍数量上限为所达到的最高区域除以 $max_book_divisor，向下取整。卡兹琳会记录当前冒险中所收集的书籍数量，以及她的图书馆规模，即她在所有冒险中累计收集的书籍总数。图书馆中每有一本书，卡兹琳的伤害提升$(amount___2)，以加算方式堆叠。每当图书馆的规模达到一个新的数量级时，其基本增益效果提升 $(amount___5)%，以乘算方式堆叠。

conditions.desc: ^^此次冒险中收集的书籍数：$(stat_value cazrin_books_collected_this_adventure 1 none)（最多 $cazrin_library_of_lore_max_books）

tipText.original: Cazrin collects books that bosses drop, which increases her damage and her library of books persists between resets.
tipText.display: 卡兹琳会收集首领掉落的书籍，这些书会提升她的伤害，并在重置后保留在她的图书馆中。

description.desc: Cazrin increases the damage of all Champions in her column (including herself) and the columns in front of her by $amount%.
卡兹琳可使她所在纵队（包括其自身）和她之前的纵队中的所有勇士的伤害提高 $amount%。

tipText.original: Cazrin increases the damage of Champions in her column and the columns in front of her.
tipText.display: 卡兹琳会提高她所在列和她前列勇士的伤害。

description.desc: Uggie's buff is increased by $amount% when Cazrin is in the formation.
当卡兹琳在阵型中时，乌吉的增益提高 $amount%
Cazrin attacks all enemies with her version of a massive fireball, dealing ultimate damage to each one.
卡兹琳用她自创版本的巨大火球攻击所有敌人，对每个敌人造成杀招伤害。
The first time anyone in the formation takes damage in each area, Cazrin casts Mage Armor on herself. Champions affected by Mage Armor decrease the damage they take by $(amount___2)%.
每个区域中，阵型内任何人首次受到伤害时，卡兹琳会对自己施放法师护甲。受到法师护甲影响的勇士所受伤害降低 $(amount___2)%。
Cazrin's attacks and abilities gain additional effects based on the number of Books that she has collected in the current adventure

conditions.desc: :^^ - 10+ Books: Cazrin fires an additional Magic Missile with her base attack.^^ - 40+ Books: Increase the effect of Sunny Disposition by $(amount___10)% for each Book she has collected in the current adventure, stacking multiplicatively.^^ - 80+ Books: Cazrin fires an additional Magic Missile with her base attack. ^^ - 120+ Books: When triggered, Mage Armor is now cast on all Champions in the formation instead of just Cazrin.^^ - 160+ Books: Increase the effect of Unctuous Uggie by $(amount___6)% for each Book Cazrin has collected in the current adventure, stacking additively.^^ - 200+ Books: Support Champions affected by Mage Armor have a $(chance___7)% chance to deal an additional 5 seconds of BUD damage with each normal attack hit.^^ - 240+ Books: Mage Armor's damage prevention is increased to $(amount_desc___8)%.^^ - 300+ Books: For each Tanking Champion affected by Mage Armor, the effect of Sunny Disposition is increased by $(amount___9)%, stacking multiplicatively.

description.desc: 卡兹琳的攻击与技能会根据她在当前冒险中收集的书籍数量获得额外效果

conditions.desc: ：^^ - 10 本以上：卡兹琳的基本攻击额外发射一枚魔法飞弹。^^ - 40 本以上：卡兹琳在本次冒险中每收集到一本书，阳光心态的效果提升 $(amount___10)%，以乘算方式堆叠。^^ - 80 本以上：卡兹琳的基本攻击额外发射一枚魔法飞弹。^^ - 120 本以上：触发时，法师护甲会施加给阵型中的全体勇士，而不仅限于卡兹琳自身。^^ - 160 本以上：卡兹琳在本次冒险中每收集到一本书，油腻乌吉的效果提升 $(amount___6)%，以加算方式堆叠。^^ - 200 本以上：受到法师护甲影响的支援型勇士在每次普通攻击命中时有 $(chance___7)% 的几率额外造成等同于 5 秒基础杀招伤害的伤害。^^ - 240 本以上：法师护甲的伤害减免效果提升至 $(amount_desc___8)%。^^ - 300 本以上：每有一位受到法师护甲影响的坦克型勇士，阳光心态的效果提升 $(amount___9)%，以乘算方式堆叠。

effect_keys.stack_title: 此次冒险中收集的书籍数

description.desc: Cazrin increases the damage bonus of Sunny Disposition by $amount% for each Fallbacks Champion and/or Champions with a Melee and/or Ranged base attack in the formation, stacking multiplicatively.
阵型中每有一位后备队勇士和/或拥有近战与/或远程基本攻击的勇士，卡兹琳就会将阳光心态的伤害加成提升 $amount%，以乘算方式堆叠。

specializationDescription.original: Forbidden by her family to study magic, Cazrin secretly taught herself the arcane arts.
specializationDescription.display: 由于家族禁止她学习魔法，卡兹琳林只能暗中自学奥术之道。

description.desc: Cazrin increases the damage bonus of Sunny Disposition by $amount% for each Fallbacks Champion and/or Good Champion in the formation, stacking multiplicatively.
阵型中每有一位后备队勇士和/或善良勇士，卡兹琳就会将阳光心态的伤害加成提升 $amount%，以乘算方式堆叠。

specializationDescription.original: Cazrin strives to use her magic for good and not follow her ancestor's twisted path.
specializationDescription.display: 卡兹琳努力用魔法行善，不愿重蹈她祖先那扭曲的道路。

description.desc: Whenever a boss drops a Book, Cazrin collects $amount_desc Books. The maximum number of Books she can collect during this adventure is tripled, but In Search of Knowledge's per Book damage boost to Sunny Disposition is reduced from 5% to $(amount_desc___2)%.
每当一个首领掉落一本书时，卡兹琳会收集 $amount_desc 本书。她在本次冒险中可收集的书籍上限提升至原来的三倍，但求知探索对阳光心态的每本书伤害加成从 5% 降低至 $(amount_desc___2)%。

specializationDescription.original: Her hunger for knowledge outweighs ambition; Cazrin would rather read than rule.
specializationDescription.display: 她对知识的渴望远胜于权力之欲；相比统治，卡兹琳更愿意沉浸在书卷之中。

description.desc: When Uggie is with Cazrin, each damage increase that Uggie! would normally apply to other members of the formation instead applies to Cazrin herself, stacking multiplicatively.
当乌吉与卡兹琳同行时，乌吉！原本会给予阵型中其他成员的每项伤害提升效果将转而作用于卡兹琳本人，以乘算方式堆叠。

specializationDescription.original: The worse Uggie smells, the harder Cazrin hits. A disturbing symbiosis.
specializationDescription.display: 乌吉越臭，卡兹琳打得越狠。一种令人不安的共生关系。

description.desc: When Uggie is with Cazrin, In Search of Knowledge's per-Book bonus for Sunny Disposition is increased by $amount___2%.
当乌吉与卡兹琳同行时，求知探索对阳光心态的每本书加成提升 $amount___2%。

specializationDescription.original: It takes true mastery to turn a smell that bad into a support strategy.
specializationDescription.display: 能把那种臭味转化为支援策略，才是真正的高手。

description.original: Sometimes you have to make sacrifices for the good of the group.
description.display: 有时候，为了团队的利益，你必须做出牺牲。

description.original: You did it! That was brilliant! I shouldn't have doubted you!
description.display: 你成功了！真是太棒了！我不该怀疑你的！

description.original: Imagine all the spells waiting to be discovered!
description.display: 想象一下，还有多少法术等待我们去发现！

description.original: It's not the first time I've dealt with dangerous magic. This is my job.
description.display: 这不是我第一次处理危险魔法了。这是我的职责。

description.original: To be honest, you had me at lost spellbook. I couldn't resist.
description.display: 说实话，从你提到“失落的魔法书”那一刻起我就被吸引了。我根本无法抗拒。

description.original: Having more knowledge is always better, even if you don't always like it.
description.display: 知识越多越好，即使你并不总是喜欢它。

effects.description: Increases the effect of Cazrin's Library of Lore order of magnitude buff by $amount%

description.original: That was my favorite satchel! Oh well. I'll just get a new one.
description.display: 那是我最喜欢的挎包！唉，算了。我再去弄一个新的就是了。

description.original: You're not going to die. This potion is going to work. You're going to wake up.
description.display: 你不会死的。这瓶药剂会起作用的。你会醒过来的。

description.original: It's like breathing the inside of a corpse...
description.display: 像是在闻尸体里面的气味……

description.original: Do you think she actually understands what we're saying?
description.display: 你觉得她真的听得懂我们在说什么吗？

description.original: I can get absorbed in my work sometimes, but I'm perfectly capable of sharing.
description.display: 我有时候确实会全神贯注于研究，但我完全有能力与人分享成果。

description.original: Knowledge should be shared by everyone, not hoarded by dragons.
description.display: 知识应该属于所有人，而不是被龙独占。

description.original: We all struggle. Why not struggle together and make the burden lighter?
description.display: 我们都会经历挣扎。那为何不一起挣扎，让负担变轻些？

description.original: It helps me get around.
description.display: 走路方便多了。

description.original: It allows for arcane attunement, and that's about it.
description.display: 能进行奥术调和，仅此而已。

description.original: Now we're ready to see some real magic.
description.display: 现在是见证真正魔法的时刻了。

description.original: You hurt my friends. That was a mistake.
description.display: 你伤害了我的朋友们。你犯了个大错。

description.original: My parents threw it out when they found it.
description.display: 我父母发现它后把它扔了。

description.original: They never found this one.
description.display: 这本他们一直没发现。

description.original: I was a lonely child. I decided to make a friend.
description.display: 我小时候很孤单。于是我决定创造一个朋友。

description.original: Keeper? Please open to the page for Fireball, thank you.
description.display: 守护者？请翻到火球术那一页，谢谢。

description.original: For practice, when I was a child. It's all in the wrist.
description.display: 我小时候练习用的。全靠手腕的巧劲。

description.original: At least it can handle cantrips, I think.
description.display: 至少能施个戏法，应该。

description.original: When you cannot afford to miss, accept no substitutes.
description.display: 当你绝不能失手时，别用替代品。

description.original: The red one is for offensive spells, the other for binding magic.
description.display: 红的是用来施攻击法术的，另一个是施束缚魔法的。

description.original: Just because Uggie eats garbage doesn't mean she can't have preferences.
description.display: 就算乌吉只吃垃圾，她也是会挑食的。

description.original: Uggie! Snack time!
description.display: 乌吉！该吃零食啦！

description.original: Uggie, no! Not again!
description.display: 乌吉，不可以！你又来了！

description.original: She'll look like a big, drooly sheepdog to anyone not paying attention.
description.display: 只要不仔细看，她就像只流口水的大狗。

description.original: Why are there no pockets!?
description.display: 为什么没有口袋！？

description.original: Acceptable covering for any adventuring mage.
description.display: 适合所有冒险法师穿着。

description.original: Perfectly suited to my tastes. Now I'm ready for anything.
description.display: 完全符合我的审美。现在我做好万全准备了。

description.original: I'm not afraid to be in the thick of things when necessary.
description.display: 必要时我不怕冲在最前线。

description.original: Careful! They keep falling over!
description.display: 小心！它们总是倒下！

description.original: This treasure trove was just rotting away! So many valuable texts!
description.display: 这些宝藏就这么烂在角落里！这么多珍贵的典籍！

description.original: It calms the nerves and soothes the soul.
description.display: 安神定气，抚慰心灵。

description.original: I know that I'm enough, just as I am.
description.display: 我知道，我本就足够好。

effects.description: Increases the damage of all Champions by $amount%
Increases the damage of all Female Champions by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Human Champions by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions with a CON score of 13 or higher by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion with a WIS score of 13 or higher in the formation
Increases the damage of all Chaotic Champions by $(amount)%

character_sheet_details.backstory: Cazrin is the ray of sunshine in the party, the eternal optimist, the friendly ear or the shoulder to cry on. She is passionate about magic, knowledge, and learning, always experimenting or testing new theories. Growing up, Cazrin's family feared and forbade the study of magic because of an ancestress who misused her power, so Cazrin was forced to teach herself and eventually leave her family behind to pursue her dreams. Intelligent but inexperienced, she has embraced a life of adventuring to gather the thrills and experiences that as a child she could only read about in books.
character_sheet_details.system_description: Cazrin is a Support and DPS Champion that collects books as she adventures with the Fallbacks' faithful companion, Uggie. Her Sunny Disposition increases the damage of Champions in her column and the columns in front of her, and she's always ready to protect herself with Mage Armor.

character_sheet_details.backstory: 卡兹琳是探险队里的一缕阳光，她永远都那么乐观，既会耐心地听你倾诉，也能让你依靠在她的肩膀上哭泣。她十分热衷于魔法、知识和学习，总是在做实验或者验证新的理论。在卡兹琳成长的过程中，她的家人畏惧魔法并禁止她研习，这是因为她的一位女性先祖曾利用魔法来作恶，因此卡兹琳不得不自学，并最终离家去追寻自己的梦想。聪慧但缺乏经验的她选择投身冒险来体验那些她儿时只能在书本中读到的惊险和奇遇。
character_sheet_details.system_description: 卡兹琳是一名支援和伤害输出型勇士，她会在与“后备队”忠实伙伴乌吉一起冒险的过程中收集书籍。她的“阳光心态”会提高她所在列以及她身前各列中勇士的伤害，并且她随时都准备好用“法师护甲”来保护自己。

display.name: 积极一面

original.name: Optimistic Outlook

display.name: 乐观展望
display.description: 你不会死的。这瓶药剂会起作用的。你会醒过来的。

original.name: Cazrin Person
original.description: It's like breathing the inside of a corpse...

display.name: 卡兹琳人类
display.description: 像是在闻尸体里面的气味……

original.name: Cazrin Friend
original.description: Do you think she actually understands what we're saying?

display.name: 卡兹琳好友
display.description: 你觉得她真的听得懂我们在说什么吗？

original.name: Dangerous Magic
original.description: I can get absorbed in my work sometimes, but I'm perfectly capable of sharing.

display.name: 危险魔法
display.description: 我有时候确实会全神贯注于研究，但我完全有能力与人分享成果。

original.name: Forbidden Magic
original.description: Knowledge should be shared by everyone, not hoarded by dragons.

display.name: 禁忌魔法
display.description: 知识应该属于所有人，而不是被龙独占。

original.name: Heavy Lifter
original.description: We all struggle. Why not struggle together and make the burden lighter?

display.name: 中流砥柱
display.description: 我们都会经历挣扎。那为何不一起挣扎，让负担变轻些？

original.name: Walking Stick
original.description: It helps me get around.

display.name: 手杖
display.description: 走路方便多了。

original.name: Standard Staff
original.description: It allows for arcane attunement, and that's about it.

display.name: 普通法杖
display.description: 能进行奥术调和，仅此而已。

original.name: Enhanced Staff
original.description: Now we're ready to see some real magic.

display.name: 强化法杖
display.description: 现在是见证真正魔法的时刻了。

original.name: Wrath of Varaith
original.description: You hurt my friends. That was a mistake.

display.name: 瓦雷斯之怒
display.description: 你伤害了我的朋友们。你犯了个大错。

original.name: Discarded Diary
original.description: My parents threw it out when they found it.

display.name: 被丢弃的日记
display.description: 我父母发现它后把它扔了。

original.name: Secret Diary
original.description: They never found this one.

display.name: 秘密日记
display.description: 这本他们一直没发现。

original.name: Animated Spellbook
original.description: I was a lonely child. I decided to make a friend.

display.name: 活化魔法书
display.description: 我小时候很孤单。于是我决定创造一个朋友。

original.name: Keeper
original.description: Keeper? Please open to the page for Fireball, thank you.

display.name: 守护者
display.description: 守护者？请翻到火球术那一页，谢谢。

original.name: Pointy Stick
original.description: For practice, when I was a child. It's all in the wrist.

display.name: 尖木棍
display.description: 我小时候练习用的。全靠手腕的巧劲。

original.name: Makeshift Wand
original.description: At least it can handle cantrips, I think.

display.name: 简易魔杖
display.description: 至少能施个戏法，应该。

original.name: Wand of Missiles
original.description: When you cannot afford to miss, accept no substitutes.

display.name: 飞弹魔杖
display.description: 当你绝不能失手时，别用替代品。

original.name: Paired Wands
original.description: The red one is for offensive spells, the other for binding magic.

display.name: 双持魔杖
display.description: 红的是用来施攻击法术的，另一个是施束缚魔法的。

original.name: Rejected Rubbish
original.description: Just because Uggie eats garbage doesn't mean she can't have preferences.

display.name: 被拒绝的垃圾
display.description: 就算乌吉只吃垃圾，她也是会挑食的。

original.name: Tasty Trash
original.description: Uggie! Snack time!

display.name: 美味垃圾
display.description: 乌吉！该吃零食啦！

original.name: Candlekeep Chew Toy
original.description: Uggie, no! Not again!

display.name: 烛堡咀嚼玩具
display.description: 乌吉，不可以！你又来了！

original.name: Perfect Disguise
original.description: She'll look like a big, drooly sheepdog to anyone not paying attention.

display.name: 完美伪装
display.description: 只要不仔细看，她就像只流口水的大狗。

original.name: Inconvenient Cloak
original.description: Why are there no pockets!?

display.name: 不便利斗篷
display.description: 为什么没有口袋！？

original.name: Practical Robe
original.description: Acceptable covering for any adventuring mage.

display.name: 实用长袍
display.description: 适合所有冒险法师穿着。

original.name: Tailored Robe
original.description: Perfectly suited to my tastes. Now I'm ready for anything.

display.name: 定制长袍
display.description: 完全符合我的审美。现在我做好万全准备了。

original.name: Mage Armored Robe
original.description: I'm not afraid to be in the thick of things when necessary.

display.name: 法师护甲长袍
display.description: 必要时我不怕冲在最前线。

original.name: Precarious Pile
original.description: Careful! They keep falling over!

display.name: 危险堆叠
display.description: 小心！它们总是倒下！

original.name: Cazrin's Collection
original.description: This treasure trove was just rotting away! So many valuable texts!

display.name: 卡兹琳的藏品
display.description: 这些宝藏就这么烂在角落里！这么多珍贵的典籍！

original.name: Fancy Tea Set
original.description: It calms the nerves and soothes the soul.

display.name: 精致茶具
display.description: 安神定气，抚慰心灵。

original.name: Tavern Key
original.description: I know that I'm enough, just as I am.

display.name: 酒馆钥匙
display.description: 我知道，我本就足够好。

effects.description: Increases the damage of all Champions by $amount%
使所有勇士的伤害提高 $amount%
Increases the damage of all Female Champions by $(amount)%
使所有女性勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Human Champions by $(amount)%
使所有人类勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions with a CON score of 13 or higher by $(amount)%
使所有体质大于等于 13 的勇士伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion with a WIS score of 13 or higher in the formation
阵型中每有一位感知大于等于 13 的勇士，所有勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Chaotic Champions by $(amount)%
使所有混乱阵营勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
